## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Soham Mazumdar (WisdomAI) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) to discuss Marcel's background, GrowthX's services, and potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company, GrowthX, leverages AI to create high-quality, research-driven content at scale for clients](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves AI-powered research, content strategy development, and human-in-the-loop editing](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [The company has grown rapidly, from 2 to 30 clients in a few months, without raising external funding](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [GrowthX's services focus primarily on creating long-form content for blogs, resource pages, and site enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and GrowthX Origin

  - [Brazilian-born, moved to Texas at 11](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Worked at IBM, HP, HashiCorp, Skill AI, and DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Developed content strategies using AI at DeepGram, 24x'd traffic in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Started workshops teaching AI-powered content creation (108 attendees across 3 cohorts)](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Transitioned to full-time CEO of GrowthX in September, \~4 months ago](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Creation Process

  - [Uses complex AI workflows for research, content strategy, and writing](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Research agent scrapes client websites, develops personas, and creates content briefs](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Content generation involves multi-step processes, not simple copy-paste from ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Human editors review outlines and provide feedback throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Fact-checking and custom knowledge bases ensure accuracy for specialized topics](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)

### Content Types and Distribution

  - [Focus on evergreen, educational content and well-researched answers to user questions](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Can repurpose existing content (e.g., podcasts, videos) into written form](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Primarily publishes on client blogs, resource sections, and programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Currently doesn't handle social media distribution (e.g., LinkedIn), but it's on the roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)

### Client Onboarding and Workflow

  - [Rapid onboarding: Week 1 for research, Week 2 for content strategy and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Uses AI for initial candidate screening in hiring process (3000 applicants filtered to top 1%)](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Flexibility to incorporate client-specific sources and knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### GrowthX's Business Growth

  - [Started with 2 clients, grew to 6, then 12, now at 30 clients](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Profitable without raising external funding](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Considering potential Series A raise for future growth](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to dive deeper into GrowthX's offerings and potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Soham to review email and coordinate with Marcel for finding a suitable time](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare more detailed showcase of GrowthX's capabilities for the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/wqs1TpFKXm_sSnHAsN9N38DYx5zursi7?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
